name: Date Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 package of dates, finely chopped (7.5 oz.)
1 egg, beaten lightly with a fork
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine the finely chopped dates, melted butter, sugar, and egg in a large pot. Stir until well combined.
2 Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. Boil for 10 minutes, ensuring the mixture does not burn.
3 Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
4 Add the Rice Krispies cereal and mix thoroughly.
5 Allow the mixture to cool sufficiently so it can be handled by hand.
6 Form small balls with the mixture and roll them in coconut flakes (or powdered sugar if desired).
7 Let the date balls cool completely before serving.
